steps.name: Regression test: resetSweep misses new staples
steps.criteria: Test adds a staple to library after trip.start(), calls resetSweep, verifies the new staple IS on the trip. MUST FAIL against current code.

steps.name: Fix: resetSweep re-populates from staple library
steps.criteria: resetSweep accepts staples parameter, rebuilds trip items from library. New staples appear. Regression test passes.

steps.name: Regression test: tap staple with null stapleId
steps.criteria: Test renders app with trip item that has stapleId=null but itemType=staple. Tapping should still trigger edit. MUST FAIL.

steps.name: Fix: match by name+area instead of stapleId
steps.criteria: TripItemRow triggers edit for any staple item regardless of stapleId. onEditStaple receives name+area. HomeView looks up staple by name+area. Regression test passes.
